text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've been workin' on the raaailroad, aaall the
livelong day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hey, Trainer! Out getting some nice, fresh air
over your gills today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Gold Ship is in her signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This? Actually, I just did battle with a massive
tuna, and boy, was it tough.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Heroes always wear red, so here I am, channeling
some of that red hero energy to myself!
choice_data_list: Is hero energy even a thing?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon, Trainer! Don't tell me you don't know
about the ultimate power of the color red!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Think back to the Saturday morning cartoons you
watched as a kid. You know, the ones about good
versus evil? Now, what color did the main
character always wear, hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ding, ding, ding! That's right! Red. The strongest,
bestest hero always wears red and always wins.
That's how the system works.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So why the heck wouldn't I pick the red outfit
when I get the chance?! I'm guaranteed to win if I
do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite follow her logic, but she seems to
have it all figured out.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's high time I set sail to find my next fishy
opponent...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just when Gold Ship turns to leave...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dun-dun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh. Hold it right there. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I believe I just heard you claim that red is a hero's
color... but what makes you so sure?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, two incredibly intimidating
Umamusume block Gold Ship's path!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Holy cannoli! Maruzen and Pearl?! What're you
two doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Red just happens to be our color too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
While many heroes do wear red, that isn't red's
only charm.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Doesn't the sight of it stir your heart? Don't you feel a mature allure?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! Why, red is the choice hue for a femme
fatale. It's the color of dangerous beauty!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Now tell me... Don't you want a taste of what it's
like to live on the edge?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Guh! Their villain vibes are off the charts!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So much for my iron-clad dissertation on why
red's the color of heroes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Help me, Trainer! What's the truth here?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Help me, Trainer! What's the truth here?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So that's how it is... All this time, I've
underestimated the power of red.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The reality is, red always had the potential to be
a hero... or a villain.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? This is new. Are you really accepting the
truth without making a fuss?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I give. Gone are the days of my childish
rebellion. I've matured.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You're all grown up now, are you? No
worries, dear. We'll show you the ropes of being
an adult. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So many new discoveries await you now that
you've taken your first step into adulthood.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But it's all right. Everyone is nervous at first, but
there's nothing to fear. Come, we'll guide you
well.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I-it's time for me to become a true adult... I'll see
you on the other side, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Everyone has to grow up someday. My time
just happens to be today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My, the sky sure is beautiful today. I sure hope
it'll be sunny again tomorrow... Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, Gold Ship's eyes seem a bit emptier
than before. Her first step into adulthood has
evidently aged her beyond her years.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're exactly right!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll make these two see that red is the
power of heroes if it's the last thing I do!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Was that a challenge? Do you really think
you can defeat us?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! You had better not hold anything back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wasn't plannin' to! Ready or not, here I cooome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship steps up boldly, just like a real hero!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But ten minutes later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can do this all day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: N-nothing's working... They're too powerful!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But... I won't give up! Here comes my finishing
move! Super-Mega-Ultra BEEEAM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship unleashes her ultimate attack!
Unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: My eyes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's beam hits Seeking the Pearl's
sunglasses, reflects off them, and shines right
back in her own face.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'll prove that red is for heroes someday,
you mark my words... Bluuergh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship collapses, but her determination
remains staunch. Her persistence will surely pay
off... someday.
